no_saved_texts:
No saved texts yet.
Take a photo or upload an image to get started!
error_no_text: No text could be found in the image.
error_server: Could not connect to server. Please check your connection.
error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
voice_default_hint: Tap to choose a voice from your device
voice_preview_hint: Tap the speaker to preview, then tap Select to use.
voice_none:
No voices found for this language.

You can install more voices in your phone's Accessibility → Text-to-Speech settings.
voice_preview_en: Hello! This is a preview of your selected voice.
terms_scroll_hint: Please scroll down and read all terms before acknowledging.
terms_sec1_body: Translations are provided by AI and may not be 100% accurate. Do not rely on them for critical decisions.
terms_sec2_body: Saved texts are stored locally. Uninstalling the app deletes all saved data permanently.
terms_sec3_body: Images must contain clear text. Blurry or handwritten text may not be read correctly.
terms_sec4_body: Images are processed online but not stored. Do not upload sensitive or personal documents.
terms_sec5_body: Free and Guest accounts are limited to 3 scans per day. Misuse may result in suspension.
terms_sec6_body: Terms may be updated occasionally. Continued use constitutes acceptance of changes.
terms_sec7_body: App is provided "as is". We are not liable for damages or translation errors.
terms_ack_note: By tapping "I Acknowledge" below, you confirm that you have read and understood these Terms and Conditions, and agree to be bound by them.
home_daily_limit_guest:
You have used all 3 free scans for today.

Create a free account or sign in to upgrade to Premium for unlimited scans and more features.
home_daily_limit_free:
You have used all 3 free scans for today.

Upgrade to Premium for unlimited scans, natural AI translation, and much more.
home_sign_in_required_desc:
You need a free account to upgrade to Premium.

Creating an account is free and only takes a minute.
home_name_entry_desc: Give this scan a short name so it is easy to find later.
settings_sign_out_prompt: Are you sure you want to sign out?
settings_lang_desc: Select up to 4 languages to show in the app. Models are stored on your device.
settings_max_lang_desc:
You can have up to 4 active languages at a time.

Please deselect one language before adding another.
settings_remove_lang_desc: Remove this language from your list and delete its translation model from this device?
settings_need_one_lang: You need at least one active language.
upgrade_fast_desc: Process texts quickly without needing an internet connection.
upgrade_priority_desc: Get help when you need it most.
home_no_saved_texts_guest: Scan an image to get started.
home_only_entries_with_name:
Only entries with a name are searched.
Tap the ✎ icon on a card to add a name.
setup_downloading:
Downloading translation models.
This only happens once.
login_err_user_not_found: No account found for that email.
login_err_invalid_credential: Incorrect email or password. Please try again.
login_err_too_many: Too many attempts. Try again later.
login_err_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
login_err_guest: Could not start as Guest. Please try again.
verify_desc_1: We sent a verification link to
verify_desc_2: Open the link in that email, then tap the button below.
verify_err_not_yet: Email not verified yet. Please click the link in your inbox first.
setup_waiting_wifi:
Waiting for Wi-Fi...
(Will auto-resume when connected)
setup_switching_wifi:
Switching to Wi-Fi...
Restarting download for faster speed.
signup_err_in_use: An account already exists for that email.
signup_err_weak_pass: Password is too weak. Use at least 6 characters.
signup_check_desc_1:
Tap the link in that email, then come back
and press the button below.
forgot_subtitle: Enter your email to receive a password reset link.
forgot_success: Password reset link sent! Check your email.
forgot_err_failed: Failed to send reset link. Please try again.
voice_loading_desc:
Fetching voices from your device
and preparing translations.
voice_hokkien_not_ready: Model not ready. Ensure model.onnx and tokens.txt are in assets/models/.
terms_copyright: You may not use the translated text produced by this application for commercial purposes or in any way that violates copyright laws.
terms_copyright_body: You may not use the translated text produced by this application for commercial purposes or in any way that violates copyright laws.
login_err_no_google: Google Sign-In is not supported on this device. Please use Email/Password.
verify_err_resend: Could not send email. Please try again later.
wifi_check_desc: You are using mobile data. Downloading large files (~30 MB) may be slow and use up your data plan.
wifi_check_no_internet_desc: Your phone is not connected to the internet. Please turn on Wi-Fi and try again.
settings_scan_mode_desc: Choose how your images are scanned. AI Scan is more accurate but uses your daily limit. Local Scan works offline and is always free.
terms_sec8_body: The local scan feature works offline directly on your device. It is always free to use and does not count towards your daily AI scan limit.
terms_app_info_body: Free users get 3 daily AI scans. After the limit is reached, scans automatically use the free offline local scan. You can also choose your preferred scan mode in Settings.
